overall.description: A maritime simulation showing the view from a ship's bridge as it navigates through choppy open waters during overcast, stormy conditions. Three electronic navigation monitors display radar, chart, and sonar data while the vessel's bow cuts through grey waves.

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the horizon on the port side

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel forward through moderate seas while monitoring the navigation displays

entered.detail: metal deck of the ship's bow with safety railings and red deck lighting
metal safety railing along the left side of the bow
metal safety railing along the right side of the bow
electronic navigation chart showing coastal map and vessel position
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep showing nearby contacts
depth finder display showing water column and seabed structure
choppy grey ocean waves extending to the horizon under stormy skies

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through choppy open waters. Three navigation monitors display chart, radar, and sonar data at the top of the frame while the ship's bow cuts through grey waves. Safety railings line both sides of the foredeck, and a lightning flash briefly illuminates the distant horizon, indicating stormy maritime conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady forward progression from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a volatile and stormy maritime environment. It begins with a view of the vessel cutting through choppy open waters, where the ship's bow slices through heavy grey waves. As the camera maintains its position, three navigation monitors at the top of the frame continuously display shifting chart, radar, and sonar data. The scene then expands across the foredeck lined with safety railings before a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the distant horizon, intensifying the overcast and stormy mood.
